criteria.reason: Bulk generation uses stored LocalOS reviews and creates local drafts only.
Credit preflight, reservation, charge, and release paths are implemented and tested.
Insufficient balance blocks with billing path.
Web Operator can trigger the action and render multiple draft results.
Docs record the manual-publication boundary and future gaps.

commands_run: python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_operator_review_reply_bulk.py tests/test_operator_manual_review.py tests/test_operator_inbox.py tests/test_operator_paid_preflight.py tests/test_operator_credit_reservation.py tests/test_operator_paid_actions.py tests/test_operator_paid_executor.py tests/test_operator_map_refresh.py tests/test_operator_audit.py tests/test_telegram_dashboard_copy.py tests/test_telegram_response_router.py
